titleStmt.title: SII 31.216: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 216. (A.R. No. B 236 of 1938.) KAMALĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Pātāḷa Sōmēśvarasvāmi temple.
This inscription is dated in the Śaka year 1539, Pingaḷa Śrāvaṇa ba. 5, corresponding to August 11, Monday, 1617 A.D.

Records the gift of four tūmus of wet land which is cultivable in two seasons (irugāru) at Kottakāluva, Reḍḍikāluva, Tāḷḷakāluva and Prātakāluva by Aḷiya Avubhalrāju, son of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jillēḷḷa Rangapatirājayya, at the request of Gāṁgareḍḍi, son Nagireḍḍi of Kāmulāpuram, for maintaining the worships and offerings to the goddess Pārvvatīdēvi at Kāmulāpuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1529 Aguna nēṭi piṁgaḷanāma
saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 5 śrīmaṁ
nmahādēvi AIna kāmulāpuraṁ
śrīpārvatīdēviki śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara jillēḷla raṁgapatirājayyadēva
mahārājulayyavāri kumā
ruṁḍu AḷiyyaAvubhaḷrājugā
riki kāmuḷāpuraṁ nāgireḍḍi ku
māruṁḍḍu goṁgaḍreḍḍi vinnapaṁcē
sukōṁgānu rājuvāru nayi

vēdyālaku samarppiṁcci Iccina
bhūdāna dharṁmaśāsanaṁ . kāmu
lāpuraṁ krottakāluvanu maḍi
taga tūmeṁḍuṁnnu mūrtti
reḍḍi kāluvanu maḍi tūmeṁ
ḍunnu tāḷlakāluvanu maḍi
tūmeṁḍanu prāṁtakā
luvanu maḍi tūmeṁḍunnu
Ākāluvalu nālugiṁṭānu
maḍi vuttamastaḷaṁ yirugāru
paṁḍē maḍigānu nalutumu
maḍiṁnni ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāI

gānu samarpiṁci Iccina bhū
dāna dharmaśāsanaṁ . dānapā
lana yōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu
pālanaṁdānācva(sva)rgamavāppōti
pālanaṁdacyataṁ padaṁ . śrī śrī
ṁjēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 31.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
